_comment: Heavenly Fate Sect OUTPOST — located on Planet Tian Yun (NOT on Planet Suzaku surface). Canon (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L186): the All-Seer's sect, 7 color divisions. The main sect is on Planet Tian Yun; this structure is a FORWARD OUTPOST in zhao_plains representing the All-Seer's reach into Planet Suzaku via agents and artifacts. Prime Directive: the outpost exists because the All-Seer's reach is objective — his agents were here before Wang Lin even knew of the sect. The main sect (on Planet Tian Yun) will be a separate dimension/teleport destination in a future phase.
